title: Link-Bearing Elements, Base URLs, Relations, Discovery, and Scheduling · Runtime Lens: Link Provenance
summary: The crawler follows canonical, alternate, preload, form, script, mailto, and base-altered references as if every discovered URL were a navigational page. Predict authorization, identity, scope, parsing, extraction, crawl state, resource use, privacy, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the link provenance increment in typed link-discovery record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, c…
objectives: Retain parent page, node or metadata source, raw reference, resolved URL, relation, anchor context, decision, and rejection reason.
Resolve, validate syntax, remove fetch fragments, canonicalize conservatively, apply authorization and robots policy, then deduplicate before scheduling.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: scraper-link-provenance — Retain parent page, node or metadata source, raw reference, resolved URL, relation, anchor context, decision, and rejection reason.
# Evidence: scraper-worked-scraper-link-discovery-relations-2
# Competency: scraper-worked-scraper-link-discovery-relations-2.
# Case 7417: a privacy-minimized internal crawl.
# Operating constraint: the prior valid checkpoint and report must survive failure.
# Changed case: change one base URL, fragment, query, Unicode host, or redirect and reapply scope.
def worked_scraper_link_discovery_relations_2(raw_references: int = 36, resolved_references: int = 34, scheduled_pages: int = 18, rejected_references: int = 16, unexplained_decisions: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked2 = "worked2-2dekrow-7417"
    assert evidence_variant_worked2
    evidence_axes_worked2 = (
        "authorizationworked2",
        "url7417",
        "response2dekrow",
        "treeworked27417",
        "frontier7417worked2",
        "report2dekrow7417",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked2)) == 6
    if raw_references < 1 or resolved_references < 0:
        return False, resolved_references, "link-count"
    if resolved_references > raw_references:
        return False, resolved_references, "resolution-accounting"
    if scheduled_pages + rejected_references != resolved_references:
        return False, scheduled_pages, "admission-reconciliation"
    if unexplained_decisions > 0:
        return False, unexplained_decisions, "link-provenance"
    assert scheduled_pages + rejected_references == resolved_references
    return True, scheduled_pages, "typed-link-discovery"

content.code:
# Evidence: scraper-link-provenance-1hm2zs
# Competency: scraper-link-provenance.
# Case 6976: an authorized nonprofit content audit.
# Operating constraint: the target owner must be able to pause the crawl.
# Changed case: change malformed markup or parser choice and preserve extraction provenance.
def evidence_scraper_link_provenance_1hm2zs(raw_references: int = 36, resolved_references: int = 34, scheduled_pages: int = 18, rejected_references: int = 16, unexplained_decisions: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1hm2zs = "1hm2zs-sz2mh1-6976"
    assert evidence_variant_1hm2zs
    evidence_axes_1hm2zs = (
        "authorization1hm2zs",
        "url6976",
        "responsesz2mh1",
        "tree1hm2zs6976",
        "frontier69761hm2zs",
        "reportsz2mh16976",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1hm2zs)) == 6
    if raw_references < 1 or resolved_references < 0:
        return False, resolved_references, "link-count"
    if resolved_references > raw_references:
        return False, resolved_references, "resolution-accounting"
    if scheduled_pages + rejected_references != resolved_references:
        return False, scheduled_pages, "admission-reconciliation"
    if unexplained_decisions > 0:
        return False, unexplained_decisions, "link-provenance"
    assert scheduled_pages + rejected_references == resolved_references
    return True, scheduled_pages, "typed-link-discovery"
